steps.title: Identify the strongest clue
steps.content: The decisive clue is the causal structure: “by lengthening the period in which they are providing financial support.” A longer support obligation harms working adults' capacity for wealth creation. The blank needs a word expressing this negative effect.

steps.title: Choose the word for the harm
steps.content: "Stymie" means to hinder or block, which matches the harmful effect on working adults' wealth creation. "Compound" would mean intensify, "disparage" means criticize, and "outstrip" means exceed; none fits the causal clue. A is correct.
